creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
FUJISHIMA Satsuki wrote:

> Patch committed, thanks.
>
> There is unresolved freetype2 problem, but I chose the way to make
> this port act the same as x11/XFree86-4 does, rather than introducing
> another problem.
>
> I think freetype2 port can be changed to install lacking parts of
> XFree86-4* if XFREE86_VERSION=4 just like graphics/Mesa3 does.

No, because it wrong place for fix. It is not freetype2 problem, so
XFree86-4 should be fixed instead.

-Maxim
